headline: Intel and Other Chip Stocks Drop After Hitting Records
summary: Intel  and other semiconductor companies were falling back on Tuesday morning after a Monday rally that sent multiple chip stocks to all-time highs.  Intel was down 3% in premarket trading after having more than doubled in the past month through Monday’s close.  Demand for artificial-intelligence infrastructure has boosted chip stocks across the board.

content.title: Intel and Other Chip Stocks Drop After Hitting Records
content.summary: Intel  and other semiconductor companies were falling back on Tuesday morning after a Monday rally that sent multiple chip stocks to all-time highs.  Intel was down 3% in premarket trading after having more than doubled in the past month through Monday’s close.  Demand for artificial-intelligence infrastructure has boosted chip stocks across the board.

headline: Tech Stocks Fall as Chip Rally Halts. Nasdaq Drops From Record High.
summary: Tech stocks looked set to drop on Tuesday, as investors took the opportunity to lock in some profit following a stellar rally in chip stocks. Futures tracking the Nasdaq 100 were 0.7% lower. Red-hot Intel and Micron Technology both slid by about 2% and Qualcomm, which hit a record high on Monday, was down by a similar amount.

content.title: Tech Stocks Fall as Chip Rally Halts. Nasdaq Drops From Record High.
content.summary: Tech stocks looked set to drop on Tuesday, as investors took the opportunity to lock in some profit following a stellar rally in chip stocks. Futures tracking the Nasdaq 100 were 0.7% lower. Red-hot Intel and Micron Technology both slid by about 2% and Qualcomm, which hit a record high on Monday, was down by a similar amount.
